title: Taylor-based Hamiltonian Simulation
description: Hamiltonian simulation using the Taylor series expansion approach.

params.help: Hamiltonian to be simulated. It must be a non-empty Hermitian square matrix provided as a 2D array; non-power-of-2 dimensions are padded internally.
params.name: H
params.info: 请输入非空厄米方阵二维数组；非2的幂维度会在算法内部补零（如 [[2, 1], [1, 3]]）

params.help: Total evolution time for the Hamiltonian simulation.
params.name: t

params.help: Degree of the approximating Taylor series. The implementation caps the effective degree at 15.
params.name: d
params.info: 请输入正整数，范围在1到15之间（如 10）
